mnemonics: CSA C-I-A Triad: Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability are the core security principles to remember for any cloud data.
keyPoints: Identity and Access Management (IAM) is fundamental to cloud security.
Data encryption (at-rest and in-transit) is a primary defense mechanism.
Shared Responsibility Model clarifies security duties between provider and customer.
commonMistakes: Assuming cloud security is solely the provider's responsibility.
Neglecting to encrypt data before uploading it to the cloud.
Using weak or default credentials for accessing cloud management consoles.
